prompt: Write the pricing-page A/B test variant C for openpatent.ai where the $4999/mo enterprise tier is shown first. Render the 5-tier ladder in this order: (1) $4999/mo enterprise — 'sovereign air-gap, FedRAMP path, 22/33 BFT sovereign-temple, named partner', (2) $2499 premium — 'cross-hive attestation, MCP 33-tool, white-label .ai', (3) $999 full — 'unlimited disclosures, BFT council review', (4) $149 defensive — '10 disclosures, C2PA manifest, hash-chained audit', (5) $29 starter — '1 disclosure/quarter, Bitcoin OTS'. Lead with the $4999 tier and a high-touch CTA ('Book a sovereign partner call'). Justify the order in 1 paragraph: 'premium-first anchoring reframes the lower tiers as loss-leader insurance; expected lift on $2499+ conversion +18-34% in B2B inbound; the $29 starter becomes a 'try before you sovereign' door.' Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {tier_order:[5 strings], lead_paragraph:string, signup_cta:string, hypothesis:string, signature:string}.
